conbody.p: The CDS Productivity Summary Report displays the daily productivity KPIs in real time at facility level. Data in the tabular report is sorted by the CDS with the highest number of the Initial Reviews.
Activity Date and Admit Date can be used to filter the data. Default value for Activity Date filter is set to last one week from the current date.
Table Info icon is present at Footnotes. Tool tip shows that this report considers the standard and custom Clarification types with Financial and Both Impact.
